channel.title: TGRoss
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGRoss, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Boiling Under the Market’s Surface
item.description: Hey, Ross here: One of the current market themes I’ve been talking about a lot is how the choppy sideways action of the broader market actually hides ...

item.title: The Right “Bullish or Bearish” Question
item.description: Hey, Ross here: Many people ask – should I be bearish or bullish? But that’s the wrong question. Let’s see what the right question really is. Chart of...

item.title: When NOT to Buy the Dip
item.description: Hey, Ross here: The strong bull market of the past few years has “trained” many people to just keep buying the dips. As a whole, that’s been a pretty ...

item.title: Who Wins This Battle?
item.description: Hey, Ross here: One of the biggest “bearish” indicators this year has been the collapse in the price of Bitcoin starting last November. So for today, ...

item.title: How to Beat the Market Without Picking Stocks
item.description: Hey, Ross here: Welcome back. It’s the last week of what has been a very choppy, sideways February for the broader markets. I don’t expect that to cha...

item.title: Boiling Under the Market’s Surface
